stories.title: All-Star Week Philadelphia Starts Tomorrow — A 50-Year Wait Is Almost Over
stories.angle: Philly hasn't hosted in 50 years. America's Semiquincentennial. The biggest week in baseball starts tomorrow — and the stage couldn't be more fitting.

article.headline: All-Star Week in Philadelphia: A 50-Year Wait, a Nation's Birthday, and Baseball's Biggest Stage

stories.title: MLB Draft — 2 Days Away, White Sox Face a Three-Way Coin Flip at No. 1
stories.angle: The Draft is happening at Citizens Bank Park — during All-Star Week, in the city everyone is watching. And the top pick is genuinely undecided two days out.

article.headline: MLB Draft 2026: Two Days Out, No. 1 Pick Is Still Anyone's Guess

stories.title: Home Run Derby 4 Days Away — Schwarber's Back in Doubt, Caglianone Is the New Name to Know
stories.angle: Schwarber is the story. Hometown favorite, MLB HR leader, defending All-Star MVP — and his Derby spot isn't guaranteed.

article.headline: Home Run Derby 2026: Schwarber's Back in Doubt, Caglianone Is the New Name to Know

stories.title: Skubal Trade — Why the Braves Are Desperate (Strider May Be Done for 2026)
stories.angle: The Braves don't want Skubal — they need him. With Strider potentially gone for the year, this is a rotation crisis, not an upgrade.

article.headline: Skubal Trade Watch: The Real Reason the Braves Are Desperate

stories.title: White Sox Stumble — Two Straight Shutouts Before the Break, Twins Quietly Surging
stories.angle: The White Sox stumble narrative — 47-42 turnaround story hits a rough patch at the worst moment.

article.headline: White Sox Stumble Before the Break, But the AL Central Race Is Still Wide Open
